technical_replicate: the average coefficient of variation (CV) of three replicates was 14.0%.
experimental_design: 4-plex labeling of BSA and yeast lysates at different ratios
We demonstrate the SMD-IPTL approach with a 4-plex labeled sample of bovine serum albumin (BSA) and yeast lysates mixed at different ratios.
factor_value: the yeast proteins mixed at ratios of 1:5:1:5
number_of_fractions: SMD-IPTL extends the multiplexing capacity to 4-plex.
number_of_technical_replicates: the average coefficient of variation (CV) of three replicates was 14.0%.
number_of_biological_replicates: three replicate maleylation reactions were performed.
number_of_samples: The number of biological replicates is 3 and the number of fractions is 4.
